verses.text: Judah kumpi, Ahaziah' tapa Joash' kum sawmnihlethumna kumin, Jehu' tapa Jehoahaz in Samaria panin Israel uk ding kipan a, amah in kum sawmlesagih sung uk hi
Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta a, Israel-te a khialhsakna, Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' khialhnate zui hi. Tuate panin amah kihemkhia lo hi
Tua ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa heh a, amah in Syria kumpipa Hazael' khutsung leh Hazael' tapa Benhadad' khutsungah amaute pia tawntung hi
Tua ciangin Jehoahaz in Topa' tungah thum a, Topa in a thu ngai hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Syria kumpipa in amaute a nen'niamna mu hi
(Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Israel tungah honpa khat pia hi. Tua ahih manin Syria-te' khutsung panin amaute suakta uh hi. Tua ciangin a nidanga bangin Israel-te a inn uhah teng uh hi
Ahi zongin Israel a khialhsakna, Jeroboam' khialhnate panin amaute kihemkhia lo uh a, amaute in tuate zui uh hi. Asherah milim zong Samaria mahah omlai hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Jehoahaz-a' dingin galkap sakol tung tuang sawmnga leh leeng sawm leh khe galkap tul sawm bang bek omlai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Syria kumpipa in amaute susia-in leivui bangin amaute a bawl hi
Tu-in Jehoahaz' gamtatna a omlaite, ama hih khempeuh, leh ama vangliatna, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Jehoahaz si a, amaute in Samaria-ah amah vui uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Jehoash in a uk hi.
Judah kumpipa Joash' kum sawmthumlesagihna kumin Jehoahaz' tapa Jehoash in Samaria panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in kum sawmleguk sung a uk hi
Amah zong Topa' muhna-ah a sia gamta hi. Israel-te a khialhsakna, Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' khialhnate khempeuh panin amah kihemkhia lo a, tua bangmahin amah gamta hi
Tu-in Jehoash' gamtatna a omlaite, ama hih khempeuh, leh Judah kumpipa Amaziah a dona a thahatnate, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Jehoash si a, ama kumpi tokhom tungah Jeroboam Nihnapa a tu hi. Tua ciangin Israel kumpi dangte tawh Samaria-ah Jehoash kivui khawm hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Elisha' Thugenkholh Nunung pen leh a Sihna

verses.text: Tu-in a sihna ding natna tawh Elisha a nat ciangin, Israel kumpipa Jehoash ama kiangah paisukin ama mai-ah kap a, “Ka pa, ka pa! Israel mite a hupipa!” ci-in a kiko hi
Tua ciangin Elisha in ama kiangah, “Thal khat leh thaltangte hong la in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in thal khat leh thaltangte a la hi
Tua ciangin amah in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “Na thal keek in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a keek hi. Tua ciangin Elisha in kumpipa khut tungah ama khutte nga hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “Nisuahna lam tawlet hong in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in hong hi. Tua ciangin Elisha in, “Na thal lawn in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in lawn hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “ Topa' gualzawhna thaltang, Syria tungah gualzawhna thaltang! Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute na beisak dongin Afek-ah Syria-te na do ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “Thaltangte la in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a la hi. Tua ciangin amah in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “Tuate tawh leilak sat in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in thumvei satin a khawl hi

Tua ciangin Pasian' mipa ama tungah hehin, “Ngavei ahi a, gukvei ahi zongin na sat ding kilawm hi. Tua hi leh na beisak dongin Syria na satpuk ding hi. Ahih hangin tu-in thumvei bek Syria na satpuk ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Elisha si a, amaute in amah a vui uh hi. Tu-in Moab mihonte in sik-hiau sungin tua gam simzel uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in misi khat a vui laitakun, amaute a sim dingin a hong pai mihon khat mu uh a, amau zong a misi uh Elisha' han sungah lawn uh hi. A misi in Elisha' guhte a sukkhak phetin hingkik a, tua ciangin ama khe-in a ding hi
Tu-in Syria kumpipa Hazael in Jehoahaz' hun sung khempeuh Israel mite nengniam hi
Ahih hangin Topa in amaute hehpihin amaute khasiat a, Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob tawh a thuciamna hangin amaute lamah amah kihei a, amaute nusialo hi. Tudongin zong ama mite mangngilhlo hi
Syria kumpipa Hazael a sih ciangin ama tangin a tapa Benhadad kumpi a suak hi

Tua ciangin a pa Jehoahaz' tung panin gal sungah Hazael in a laksa khuapite Hazael' tapa Benhadad tung panin Jehoahaz' tapa Jehoash in lakik hi. Jehoash in amah thumvei zo-in Israel khuapite a ngahkik hi.
